4.1.title: Understanding the organization and its context

internal_issues.yes: The organization has identified internal issues relevant to its purpose and strategic direction.
internal_issues.no: The organization has not adequately identified internal issues relevant to its purpose and strategic direction.

external_issues.yes: External issues relevant to the organization have been identified.
external_issues.partial: External issues have been identified; however, the identification is not comprehensive.

monitoring_review.yes: A documented mechanism is established to monitor and review these issues.
monitoring_review.no: A documented mechanism to monitor and review these issues has not been established.

4.2.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties

interested_parties.yes: Relevant interested parties have been identified.
interested_parties.no: Relevant interested parties have not been formally identified.

requirements_defined.yes: The needs and expectations of interested parties have been determined and are monitored.
requirements_defined.no: The needs and expectations of interested parties are not fully determined or monitored.

4.3.title: Determining the scope of the QMS

scope_defined.yes: The scope of the Quality Management System has been defined considering internal and external issues.
scope_defined.no: The scope of the Quality Management System has not been adequately defined.

documented.yes: The scope is documented and maintained as documented information.
documented.no: The scope is not adequately documented.

4.4.title: Quality Management System and its processes

processes_defined.yes: The processes needed for the QMS have been identified.
processes_defined.no: The processes needed for the QMS have not been fully identified.

interactions.yes: The sequence and interaction of processes are determined.
interactions.no: The interaction of processes is not clearly defined.

controls.yes: Criteria and controls required for effective operation are defined.
controls.no: Criteria and controls for effective operation are not adequately defined.

leadership_commitment.yes: Top management demonstrates leadership and commitment to the QMS.
leadership_commitment.no: Leadership commitment to the QMS is not adequately demonstrated.

policy_established.yes: A quality policy has been established and is appropriate to the organization.
policy_established.no: A quality policy has not been adequately established.

communicated.yes: The quality policy is communicated and understood within the organization.
communicated.no: The quality policy is not effectively communicated.

roles_defined.yes: Roles, responsibilities and authorities are defined and communicated.
roles_defined.no: Roles, responsibilities and authorities are not clearly defined.

6.1.title: Actions to address risks and opportunities

risks_identified.yes: Risks and opportunities have been identified.
risks_identified.no: Risks and opportunities have not been adequately identified.

actions_planned.yes: Actions to address risks and opportunities are planned and implemented.
actions_planned.no: Actions to address risks and opportunities are not adequately planned.

objectives_defined.yes: Quality objectives are established at relevant functions and levels.
objectives_defined.no: Quality objectives are not adequately established.

monitored.yes: Quality objectives are monitored and reviewed.
monitored.no: Quality objectives are not adequately monitored.

changes_planned.yes: Changes to the QMS are carried out in a planned manner.
changes_planned.no: Changes to the QMS are not adequately planned.

resources_provided.yes: Resources required for the QMS are determined and provided.
resources_provided.no: Resources required for the QMS are not adequately provided.

competence_defined.yes: Competence requirements are defined for personnel.
competence_defined.no: Competence requirements are not clearly defined.

training.yes: Training and evaluation of competence are conducted.
training.no: Training and competence evaluation are not adequately conducted.

awareness.yes: Personnel are aware of the quality policy and objectives.
awareness.no: Personnel awareness of the quality policy and objectives is inadequate.

communication_defined.yes: Internal and external communications are determined.
communication_defined.no: Communication processes are not adequately defined.

documents_controlled.yes: Documented information is controlled as per requirements.
documents_controlled.no: Control of documented information is inadequate.

operations_planned.yes: Operational processes are planned and controlled.
operations_planned.no: Operational planning and control are inadequate.

nonconformity_control.yes: Nonconforming outputs are identified and controlled.
nonconformity_control.no: Control of nonconforming outputs is inadequate.

internal_audit.yes: Internal audits are conducted at planned intervals.
internal_audit.no: Internal audits are not conducted as planned.

follow_up.yes: Corrective actions are taken and followed up.
follow_up.no: Follow-up actions from internal audits are inadequate.

management_review.yes: Management reviews are conducted at planned intervals.
management_review.no: Management reviews are not conducted as required.

corrective_action.yes: Corrective actions are implemented and reviewed.
corrective_action.no: Corrective actions are not adequately implemented.

improvement.yes: Continual improvement of the QMS is demonstrated.
